_comment: Copy this folder and modify to create your own workspace. Run with: python src/main.py -w <name>

meta.name: default
meta.description: Default behavior — extracted from common_ai_agent source

env._comment: Env vars to override. Shell env > workspace.json > .config > .env
env._disabled_tools_comment: ask_user is allowed by default; only orchestrator disables it explicitly. record_ssot_qa stays disabled in default and is re-enabled per workflow that needs it (ssot-gen, req-gen, architect). dispatch_workflow and read_pipeline_state are orchestrator-only and hidden from default chat.
